title: Sci-Fi Thrillers 2026
content:
2026 promises to be a game-changer for sci-fi fans, with a diverse lineup of movies that will keep you on the edge of your seat. From post-apocalyptic adventures to AI-powered courtroom dramas, this year's slate has something for everyone.

At PickMyBinge, we're excited to dive into the latest and greatest in sci-fi thrillers. In this article, we'll take a deep dive into five of the most anticipated movies of the year, exploring their plots, themes, and what makes them must-watch material.

Get ready to explore the thrilling world of sci-fi. Whether you're a fan of action-packed adventures or thought-provoking dramas, we've got you covered.

Greenland 2: Migration (2026)

Starring Gerard Butler, Morena Baccarin, Roman Griffin Davis

Hope is uncharted territory.

Greenland 2: Migration picks up where the first movie left off, with the Garrity family finding safety in a Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke devastates the Earth. However, their relief is short-lived, as they soon realize that their new home is not as secure as they thought. With the threat of radiation and hostile survivors looming large, the family must embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

The movie's exploration of hope and resilience in the face of catastrophic failure is thought-provoking. The film raises important questions about the human condition, forcing viewers to confront their own mortality and the importance of human connection in the face of adversity.

The themes of survival and redemption are expertly woven throughout the narrative, making for a gripping and emotionally charged viewing experience. With its talented cast and tight plot, Greenland 2: Migration is a must-watch for fans of post-apocalyptic thrillers.

PickMyBinge readers will love the movie's fast-paced action sequences, combined with its thoughtful exploration of the human condition. The movie's stunning visuals and impressive special effects only add to its appeal, making it a must-see for anyone looking for a thrilling sci-fi adventure.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 8/10

War Machine (2026)

Starring Alan Ritchson, Dennis Quaid, Stephan James

All grit. No quit.

War Machine follows a combat engineer as he leads his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine. The movie takes place during Army Ranger training, where the stakes are high and the tension is palpable. As the team navigates the challenges of their mission, they must also confront their own personal demons and learn to work together if they hope to survive.

The movie's unique blend of science fiction and military action is a highlight. The otherworldly threat adds an extra layer of complexity to the traditional war movie genre, making for a fresh and exciting viewing experience.

The themes of camaraderie and perseverance are expertly woven throughout the narrative, making for a gripping and emotionally charged viewing experience. With its talented cast and tight plot, War Machine is a must-watch for fans of science fiction and action movies.

PickMyBinge readers will love the movie's fast-paced action sequences, combined with its thoughtful exploration of the human condition. The movie's stunning visuals and impressive special effects only add to its appeal, making it a must-see for anyone looking for a thrilling sci-fi adventure.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 8.5/10

Mercy (2026)

Starring Chris Pratt, Rebecca Ferguson, Kali Reis

Prove your innocence to an AI judge or face execution.

Mercy takes place in a near-future world where AI has become an integral part of the justice system. The movie follows a detective who stands on trial accused of murdering his wife, with only 90 minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced AI Judge he once championed.

The movie's thought-provoking exploration of the intersection of technology and humanity is a standout. The film raises important questions about the role of AI in our lives, forcing viewers to confront the potential consequences of relying on machines to make life-or-death decisions.

The themes of justice and morality are expertly woven throughout the narrative, making for a gripping and emotionally charged viewing experience. With its talented cast and tight plot, Mercy is a must-watch for fans of science fiction and crime dramas.

PickMyBinge readers will love the movie's unique blend of science fiction and courtroom drama, combined with its thoughtful exploration of the human condition. The movie's stunning visuals and impressive special effects only add to its appeal, making it a must-see for anyone looking for a thrilling sci-fi adventure.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 8/10

28 Years Later: The Bone Temple (2026)

Starring Ralph Fiennes, Jack O'Connell, Alfie Williams

Fear is the new faith.

28 Years Later: The Bone Temple takes place in a world where a new relationship has formed, with consequences that could change the world as we know it. The movie follows Dr. Kelson as he navigates this new reality, while Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

The movie's unique blend of horror and science fiction is a highlight. The film's thought-provoking exploration of fear and faith makes for a gripping and emotionally charged viewing experience.

The themes of survival and redemption are expertly woven throughout the narrative, making for a thrilling and unpredictable ride. With its talented cast and tight plot, 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple is a must-watch for fans of horror and science fiction.

PickMyBinge readers will love the movie's fast-paced action sequences, combined with its thoughtful exploration of the human condition. The movie's stunning visuals and impressive special effects only add to its appeal, making it a must-see for anyone looking for a thrilling sci-fi adventure.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 7.5/10

Killer Whale (2026)

Starring Virginia Gardner, Mel Jarnson, Mitchell Hope

It's feeding time.

Killer Whale follows best friends Maddie and Trish as they find themselves trapped in a remote lagoon with a dangerous killer whale named Ceto. The movie takes place in a world where science and nature collide, making for a thrilling and unpredictable ride.

The movie's unique blend of science fiction and horror is a standout. The film's thought-provoking exploration of the natural world makes for a gripping and emotionally charged viewing experience.

The themes of survival and friendship are expertly woven throughout the narrative, making for a thrilling and unpredictable ride. With its talented cast and tight plot, Killer Whale is a must-watch for fans of science fiction and horror movies.

PickMyBinge readers will love the movie's fast-paced action sequences, combined with its thoughtful exploration of the human condition. The movie's stunning visuals and impressive special effects only add to its appeal, making it a must-see for anyone looking for a thrilling sci-fi adventure.

PickMyBinge Verdict: 7/10
Title Genre Rating Must-Watch Factor
Greenland 2: Migration Science Fiction, Adventure, Thriller 6.5 High
War Machine Science Fiction, Action, Thriller 7.2 High

28 Years Later: The Bone Temple Horror, Thriller, Science Fiction 7.2 High

If you enjoyed these sci-fi thrillers, you might also like The Tomorrow War, Annihilation, and Ex Machina. These movies offer a similar blend of science fiction and action, with thought-provoking themes and gripping storylines.
